svg.title: AWS Glue workflow — healthcare data platform
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the AWS Glue Crawler running on a 30-minute schedule during shift hours, scanning S3 bronze/sftp/, updating the Glue Catalog schema, which Databricks Auto Loader then reads via schema hints for Bronze ingestion.
svg.text: AWS Glue — schema catalog only (no ETL jobs)

g.text: scans S3 · infers column types · detects new hospitals
